meaning: n.(箭,子弹,枪,炮等)群射,齐发,(质问,咒骂等的)迸发,(网球vt.群射,齐发,截击vi.进行群射,齐鸣
examples: She hit a forehand volley into the net.
They fired off a volley of shots.
The Reds dominated the early exchanges and took a 10th-minute lead through Maxi Rodriguez's deflected volley.
Banks could only watch in hope as Nicky Southall's volley rebounded off the woodwork.
